data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Navigation elements are designed for ease of use, being larger and in predictable locations.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified decision making by reducing choice overload in interfaces.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Familiarity from maintaining consistent experiences aligning with user habits.
data.technical_spec: UI resembling common design patterns from frequent web use.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunking content to help users process information more effectively.
data.technical_spec: Content organization into categories and playlists.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Users remember peak moments and the end, enhancing satisfaction with key highlights.
